data.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 44 (Travel Rule) + Art. 89 (two-stage phase-in: domestic by Feb 2027, international by 2 Feb 2028) + Art. 88 (authorisation adjustment period — 270-day adequação; internal controls / cybersecurity / Law 13.810/2019); Res BCB 521/2025 (KYT / self-hosted wallets)

data.instrument: Lei 14.478/2022; BCB regulations
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 20 (besides SPSAVs, only commercial/exchange/investment/multiple banks, Caixa, CTVM/DTVM and FX brokers may provide intermediation/custody, with restrictions); Art. 4 (SPSAV modalities)

data.instrument: Resolução Conjunta CMN/BCB nº 14/2025; Res BCB 517/2025 (both 3 Nov 2025) — SPSAV minimum-capital methodology
data.pinpoint: Resolução Conjunta CMN/BCB nº 14/2025 + Res BCB nº 517/2025 (both 3 Nov 2025): minimum capital R$10,800,000 to R$37,200,000 scaled by the set of activities performed

data.instrument: Res BCB 521/2025 (virtual assets in the FX market); Lei 14.286/2021 (Foreign Exchange Law)
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 521 — per-operation caps (USD 100k SPSAV / USD 500k FX-FI when counterparty not FX-authorised); amends the Res 277/278/279 FX trio, inserting Art. 76-A into Res 277/2022 as the câmbio-inclusion hook (legal base: Lei 14.286/2021)

data.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 — patrimonial segregation (segregação patrimonial)
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 (patrimonial segregation: client funds in individualised payment/deposit accounts; client virtual assets in segregated wallets; foreign-custodian conditions — home-country authorisation/supervision, Brazil representative, enforceable guarantees, formal segregation of Brazilian clients' assets)

data.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 (proof-of-reserves + biennial independent audit + published reports); Res BCB 521/2025 Art. 82-A (monthly BCB reporting); IN BCB 701 (22 Jan 2026)
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 (proof of reserves; periodic audits; transparent information flows); Res BCB 521/2025 (monthly FX-operations reporting from 4 May 2026)

data.instrument: Res BCB 519/2025 (authorisation regime); Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 4 (provider modalities)
data.pinpoint: Lei 14.478/2022 (BCB authorisation required to provide virtual-asset services); Res BCB 519/2025 (authorisation process); Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 4 (three SPSAV modalities: intermediária, custodiante, corretora), Art. 14 (sociedade limitada/anônima; ≥3 administrators; head office in Brazil); authorisation deadline 30 Oct 2026 (270 days)

data.instrument: Res BCB 521/2025 (FX reclassification + caps); Res BCB 561/2026 (eFX exclusion); Lei 14.286/2021
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 521/2025 (amends Res 277/278/279 of 31 Dec 2022): virtual-asset services brought into the FX market — international payments/transfers, stablecoin trades, and payment of expenses abroad treated as câmbio operations; monthly reporting to the BCB from 4 May 2026

data.instrument: Lei 14.478/2022 (Marco Legal dos Ativos Virtuais); BCB implementing rulemaking

data.instrument: 《关于进一步防范和处置虚拟货币等相关风险的通知》(银发〔2026〕42号, 6 Feb 2026; repealed 银发〔2021〕237号); 2017 ICO Notice (94公告)
data.pinpoint: 银发〔2026〕42号 (virtual-currency-related business activities in the PRC are illegal financial activities, strictly prohibited; the prohibited act is upgraded from '代币发行融资' (token-offering financing, 2021) to '发行虚拟货币' (issuing virtual currency), now reaching non-fundraising / airdrop / utility issuance)

data.instrument: 《关于进一步防范和处置虚拟货币等相关风险的通知》(银发〔2026〕42号, eff. 6 Feb 2026; repealed 银发〔2021〕237号); 2017 ICO Notice (94公告)
data.pinpoint: 银发〔2026〕42号 — 未经许可，境内外任何主体不得在境外发行挂钩人民币的稳定币 (no entity, domestic or overseas, may issue RMB-pegged stablecoins overseas without approval); 境内主体及其控制的境外主体不得在境外发行虚拟货币 (PRC-controlled entities may not issue virtual currencies abroad); RWA tokenisation restrictions

data.instrument: 《关于进一步防范和处置虚拟货币等相关风险的通知》(银发〔2026〕42号, 6 Feb 2026); issuing bodies: PBOC, NDRC, MIIT, MPS, SAMR, NFRA, CSRC, SAFE, with 中央网信办/最高法/最高检
data.pinpoint: 银发〔2026〕42号 (a coordinated multi-agency prohibition perimeter; eight ministries plus the cyberspace administration and the two supreme judicial organs)
